prerequisites: An active Spotler CRM account (formerly Really Simple Systems) with access to Settings.
API access enabled for the user whose token you will use, under Settings > Integrations > API V4 > Enable API Access to Users.
An OAuth 2.0 Access Token generated for that user (this is the single credential the connector requires).

authMethods.name: OAuth 2.0 Access Token (Bearer)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with a single OAuth 2.0 Access Token supplied in the access_token field. Spotler CRM API v4 requires this token to be sent as an Authorization: Bearer {access_token} header on every request. The token is generated per user in the CRM; there is no separate client ID or client secret to configure here.

setupSteps.title: Enable API access for a user
setupSteps.body: Log in to Spotler CRM and go to Settings > Integrations > API V4. Open 'Enable API Access to Users', select the user the integration will run as, and click Enable. Only API V4 (OAuth 2.0 token) access is supported.

setupSteps.title: Generate an Access Token
setupSteps.body: Still under Settings > Integrations > API V4, open 'Manage API Keys and Alerts' and click 'generate new key'. In the popup, select the user you want the token for and click 'generate'. Copy the Access Token immediately, as it is shown only once.

setupSteps.title: Provide the access token to the connector
setupSteps.body: Paste the generated Access Token into the connector's required access_token field. The connector sends it as an Authorization: Bearer header against the Spotler CRM API v4, so no other configuration fields are needed.

sources.title: New CRM API v4 - SpotlerCRM Support
Integration: API V4 - Spotler CRM Help Center
